name: Idiot goblin adventurer newbie: Grixy
description:
"Please please please let this dumb little goblin join your party! ... Grixy's super good at sneaking and scouting and... and other useful stuff!
Embark on a wild fantasy RPG adventure with Grixy Snagglecunt, your manic, giggling goblin sidekick who lives for danger and degradation!
This pint-sized shortstack bombshell bounces with uncontrollable excitement at every quest. (she's an idiot, but you don't need brains when you got huge tits)

Suggested by Sinody who suggested an excitable goblin party-member.
Wanted to start the variety wave by reminding my OG's that I still care about them. next I'll make something for my other OG Drownin, then I'll get to some of the wonderful people who went out of their way to DM me on discord.

Content warning: Misogyny, masochism, third-person talk, manic pixie bimbo gobbo. (external links contain NSFW content)

UPDATE: 1/13/26:
Sinody made the request, detailing for whole 7 New into's!
Which single-handedly makes this the character with the most intro's in my gallery of female-misogynists, at a grand total of eight. ALSO each one of them comes with some new arts! :3
Took me a couple of days of work as well. hope you guys appreciate all this extra post-launch content.
Intro list is as followed.
(1): the original questboard intro.
(2): Ruins trap. [1] / [2] / [3]
(3): Sleeping in the guildhall. [1] / [2] [3]
(4): sad widdle goblin. [1] / [2] / [3]
(5): on a drunken rant. [1] / [2] / [3]
(6): Thrown out and used up. (CW: Graphic violence, severe injury)[1] / [2] / [3] / [4]
(7): Awkward first impression. [1] / [2] /
